name: Virgin Killer Sweating || C&C
description:
[Comfort and Sweats with a brand new theme at the C&C]

Description: It seems like that Neru Mikamo, Ichinose Asuna, Kakudate Karin, Murokasa Akane, and Asuma Toki of the C&C club has some sort of surprise up their sleeves for a theme at their cafe in Millennium Science School following a new trend in Kivotos. Courtesy of Asuna's idea, the supposed comfy sweaters turns out to be virgin killer sweaters in combination with armpits showing for the club's new temporary theme...

Series: Blue Archive

Artist: Dishwasher1910 | DISH
creator: Chunter
